valid_partitions: provider timeout -> pending review -> later success callback -> capture
decision_rules: 3DS required and state=INITIATED -> transition to AUTH_REQUIRED
3DS success and state=AUTH_REQUIRED -> transition to AUTHENTICATED
3DS fail/cancel and state=AUTH_REQUIRED -> transition to FAILED
state=AUTHENTICATED -> allow CAPTURE -> transition to CAPTURED
state=PENDING_REVIEW -> forbid CAPTURE until final callback
retry allowed only when state=FAILED and retry_count < 2
exception_cases: provider callback does not match payment id
